description_long: This house features a multi-level, boxy structure with a complex, staggered layout and a predominantly light gray exterior. The roof is covered with gray shingles and includes several flat sections with green patches, possibly representing rooftop gardens or terraces. Windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with a mix of single and double panes, and a round window is visible on one side. The main entryway is a simple door with no visible porch or steps, blending into the facade. The overall design suggests a modern, modular architectural style with functional outdoor spaces. The house appears to be constructed primarily from wood or fiber cement siding, with shingled roofing and glass windows.
description: A modern, multi-level house with a light gray exterior, shingled roof, and asymmetrical window arrangement. Features include rooftop terraces and a simple, flush entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, a mix of rectangular windows, and the staggered facade.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the layered roof structure, multiple windows, and rooftop green spaces.
description_view_2: Side view with a prominent round window and a clear view of the shingled roof and vertical siding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying large, vertically aligned windows and the main rooftop terrace.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch or steps, minimal decorative elements
